name: Pumpkin Marble Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, pecans, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom and 1 1/2-inches up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the cream cheese, 3/4 cup sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Set aside to chill.
5. Add remaining sugar, pumpkin, and spices to the chilled batter. Mix well.
6. Alternately layer the pumpkin and cream cheese batters over the crust.
7. Cut through the batters several times with a knife for a marble effect.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 55 minutes.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim. Chill.
